title: Nightmare│夢魘
description: The Phantom's attacks are more powerful, but they disappear after attacking, and their health is reduced.│幻影的攻擊更強大，但攻擊後就會消失，同時生命值也有所減少。
body:
# Function│功能
1. Phantom's max health reduced to 2.│幻翼的最大生命值減少至2。
2. After attacking, the phantom will dissipate and will not produce any drops.│幻翼攻擊後會消散，不會產生任何掉落物。
3. The phantom's attack deals 10 damage (Normal difficulty) and prevents the target from sleeping that night.│幻翼的攻擊會造成10點傷害（普通難易度）並阻止目標在這個晚上入睡。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
